name: War Flag
why: A strong Epic relic that provides valuable team-wide buffs for every faction. Its versatility and consistent performance make it one of the better Epic relics, especially before obtaining a full set of top-tier Legendary relics.
description: Raises the War Flag to inspire allied heroes, increasing their combat effectiveness through powerful team-wide buffs. War Flag offers excellent utility in both PvP and PvE, making it a reliable support relic for players at every stage of progression.
